title: Solid Sales Growth Makes These 5 Stocks Worth Betting on
text: Solid sales growth is vital to gauge a company's health and ability to sustain its business. Let's check out News Corporation (NWSA), Commercial Metals (CMC), Lennar (LEN), Lithia Motors (LAD) & Comstock Resources (CRK), which are posting top-line growth.

title: News Corporation: Attractive Upside Still Exists
text: News Corporation has fared well recently, both on its top line and on its bottom line.
